snippets.title: Cookie JWT auth setup
snippets.content: auth = CookieJWTAuth(login_url=f"{args.url}/api/v1/auth/login-handler", username_field='email', password_field='password', username=args.username, password=args.password, cookie_name='stellarbridge', jwt_source='cookie', content_type='json', csrf_protection=csrf, session_endpoint=f"{args.url}/")

snippets.title: Run a Playwright test file and assert
Use Playwright sync API directly in scythe
snippets.content:
from scythe.playwright import Wrap
with Wrap(headless=True) as pw:
    pw.page.goto('https://target.com/login')
    pw.page.fill('#username', 'admin')
    pw.page.click('button[type=submit]')
    pw.expect_url_contains('/dashboard')

snippets.title: PlaywrightRunAction in a Journey Step
snippets.content:
from scythe.playwright import PlaywrightRunAction
Step(name='Playwright tests', description='Run PW tests', actions=[PlaywrightRunAction(test_file='tests/test_login.py', expected_result=True)])

snippets.title: PlaywrightWrapAction subclass for inline Playwright
snippets.content:
from scythe.playwright import PlaywrightWrapAction

class LoginTest(PlaywrightWrapAction):
    def run(self, page, context):
        page.goto(context['target_url'] + '/login')
        page.fill('#username', 'admin')
        page.click('button[type=submit]')
        return '/dashboard' in page.url
